red_lines: Direct military attack on Iranian territory
Nuclear program dismantlement without sanctions relief

decision_history.event_description: Israeli strikes on Iranian proxies and direct attacks on Iranian soil
decision_history.decision_taken: Launched unprecedented direct missile and drone attack on Israel in April 2024, followed by measured response to subsequent Israeli strikes
decision_history.outcome: Demonstrated willingness to escalate directly, managed to avoid full-scale war

decision_history.event_description: Nuclear program advancement amid collapsed JCPOA
decision_history.decision_taken: Continued uranium enrichment to near-weapons grade (60%+) while maintaining ambiguity about weaponization
decision_history.outcome: Enhanced leverage, increased international pressure, maintained breakout capability

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Revolutionary Guard, Basij militia, conservative clergy, rural poor

military_posture.force_disposition: asymmetric warfare capability with regional proxy network
